verses.text: Depart from me, you wicked men, that I may in God’s law remain. Uphold my life, LORD, by your word; let not my hope be put to shame.
O keep me safe and hold me up that I upon your word may gaze. You spurn those who forsake your laws; their false deceit is all in vain.
The wicked you discard like dross; for this I love your holy law. My body quakes for fear of you; of your commands I stand in awe.
